subcodes.first_line: At this hour when the heavens weep and the clouds raise their lamentation, the Lord of Power dwelleth in the most exalted citadel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین که آسمان میگرید و سحاب نوحه مینماید مالک قدر در اعلی مقام قصر علی
subcodes.subjects: @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
